title: cyathea angiensis
intro: Cyathea angiensis, also known as the Angié fern, is a species of plant in the Cyathea genus, which is a type of tree fern native to New Caledonia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyathea angiensis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as being used to treat various skin conditions and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Cyathea angiensis include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and stems.
